series_metadata.series_description: This record series includes all pertinent information pertaining to the employment history for all of the employees (including College Interns) employed by The Ohio Department of Transportation. This record series may contain but is not limited to the following documents: Personnel Actions, Discipline Documentation, Employee Forms, Applications, Certifications and Performance Evaluations. This file is compiled and maintained by the Central Office and District Personnel Sections.
